name: DirectoryList
description: Vertical follow-list — labelled block where each row pairs a 48 thumbnail, identity column (name + followers + description), and a trailing Follow toggle. Sibling of SuggestionList: same entity-agnostic row anatomy, but no swipeable pager — the full set is scanned vertically. Reach for it on browse / 'new channels' / 'people you may know' surfaces.
wrapperGuidance: Owns its inline padding internally. Place as a direct child of the page-shell <main> (or any host that pays the gutter once). Do NOT wrap in a padding-inline div, className="px-*", or style={{ padding }} — the page rail is paid once at the shell, never on the full-bleed child. Inside a bounded surface (Dialog / BottomSheet / SideSheet), apply the negative-margin opt-out — see AGENTS.md § Composition rules.

standalone.context: Direct child of the page shell or any host that pays the page-rail gutter once.

embedded.trigger: prop `embedded={true}` on <DirectoryList /> OR direct child of `.chorus-section` / `.chorus-feed` (DOM-ancestry safety net).
embedded.context: Composed inside another rail-responsible host (`<Section label="New channels"><DirectoryList embedded /></Section>`). Row content takes over from the host's content-box edge.
